findings.message: New scrape job 'redis' added with no corresponding alert rule in infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/
findings.suggestion: Create an alert rule file (e.g., redis.yml) in infra/observability/prometheus/alerts/ to monitor Redis health and performance metrics (e.g., redis_up, redis_connected_clients, redis_memory_usage_bytes)
